goal: 记录 stale proposed notes / closed PR recovery 缺口

summary.title: 记录 stale proposed notes 修复缺口
summary.what: 新增 known issue 文档，记录 Mainline 在 closed/unmerged PR 产生的 stale proposed notes 场景下，doctor 能诊断但 abandon 不能修复的控制面缺口。
summary.why: better 的 MES 标准化交付被 notes_rewrite_drift 阻塞，排查发现 5 条 notes 可通过 migrate 自动迁移，但 2 条 closed PR 的 proposed intent 只能被 doctor 识别为 review_then_abandon，标准 abandon 命令却返回 NO_ACTIVE_INTENT。该现象需要沉淀到 Mainline 项目，作为后续 CLI 修复依据。
summary.user_goal: 记录 stale proposed notes / closed PR recovery 缺口

decisions.rationale: 这是已观察到的产品/控制面缺口，不是已定稿 spec；known issue 比 reference 或 specs 更贴近当前状态。

decisions.chose: 记录现象、证据、根因判断、缺失能力、推荐修复方向和验收标准
decisions.rationale: 后续实现者需要同时理解 notes migration、proposal doctor、abandon lifecycle 和 remote notes sync 的关系。

rejected.alternative: 直接修改 Mainline CLI 行为
rejected.reason: 当前请求是记录问题到新分支文档；实现修复需要另起设计和测试切片。

rejected.alternative: 在 existing specs 中改写为规范
rejected.reason: 该问题仍是诊断出的缺口和修复建议，尚未形成稳定协议。

review_notes: 验证通过：git diff --cached --check；提交后 mainline preflight --json 为 ok。
本分支只新增文档，不修改 CLI、测试、Mainline notes、actor log 发布逻辑或 GitHub 状态。
主 checkout 存在 unrelated dirty/untracked 文件，因此使用独立 worktree /Users/envvar/.codex/worktrees/mainline-stale-proposed-notes-doc。

architectural_claims: Mainline currently has a repair gap between proposal doctor diagnostics and abandon lifecycle execution for notes-backed stale proposed intents.
Safe notes migration by tree hash or patch-id does not cover semantic cleanup of closed, superseded proposed PR intents.
Local notes recovery can be overwritten by default remote sync unless the shared notes or lifecycle metadata is repaired.
behavioral_changes: Adds a documented known issue and acceptance criteria for future repair work.
